prompt: Write me a LinkedIn connection request and an opening DM to a cold prospect.
reason: LinkedIn DMs are outbound, not feed posts.

prompt: Write a single LinkedIn post announcing our funding round.
reason: One post, not a posting-cadence plan.

prompt: Plan my posting schedule across three accounts for the week.
reason: Cadence across properties, not authoring one post.

prompt: Build a competitive battlecard for reps selling against Salesforce.
reason: Rep-facing battlecard, not a market map.

prompt: Show me a 2x2 of the market and the open white space.
reason: Positioning map, not a sales battlecard.

prompt: Give me 4 headline variants to A/B test, each with a hypothesis.
Write the one-page campaign brief for our fall promotion.
Turn this customer interview transcript into a case study.
Write a cold email to a prospect I've never contacted, plus a follow-up.
Draft a welcome nurture flow for new signups who haven't activated.
Build our buyer personas with pains and objections.
Check this single draft post against our voice before I publish it.
Score our existing homepage and deck against our strategy with a fix list.
Build SEO content briefs from these keywords for my writers.
Make a self-contained HTML slide deck from these bullets.
Help us decide what our launch stands for, the wedge and one-liner, not the timeline.
Give me the phase-by-phase launch sequence and asset list. Positioning is already done.
Write a Twitter thread about our engineering migration.
Give me 5 Meta ad headlines and primary text for our free trial.
Help me decide whether to sponsor this conference, a clear call, not a plan.
reason: A decision call, not a campaign or launch plan.

prompt: Give me a batch of on-brand organic posts plus a blog intro, consistent voice.
reason: On-voice content set, not paid ads.

prompt: I just connected. Confirm it works and show me what brand data you can see.
reason: Connection smoke test and DNA read-back.
